raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazztja uṣ man:
Tu Ziiweka Behrns/ ta faḳka
tas KUngs KUNGSS: Schee
irri ta Altara Likkumi/ tai Dee-
nâ/ kad wiꞥſch taps darrihts/
ka Dedsamo·Uppuri us to tohg
uppureti/ un Aſins us to tohg
flazzinahts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un teem Preestereem no
Lewja/ kas no Zahdaka Dsimun-
ma irri/ kas pee man klaht eet/
fakka tas KUngs KUNGSS/ man
kaspoht/ buhs tew doht weenu
jaunu Wehrſiti pahr Grehku-
Uppuri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs no winna
Aſinim neint/ un to pee winna
tschetreem Raggeem likt/ un pee
teem tschetreem Stuhreem to ap-
kahrteju Libstu/ un pee tahs
Mallas apkahrt/ ta buhs tew
winnu falihdsinaht un fschkfstiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to buhs tew to Wehr-
fi ta Grehku·Uppura neint/ un
winnam buhs to fadedsinaht
weenâ nospreesta Weetâ ta Mam-
ma/ ahran tahs fivehtas Weetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ohtrâ Deena buhs tew
weenu Ahſi/ kas bes Wainas
par Grehku·Uppuri uppureht/
un teem buhs to Altari falihdsi-
naht/ itt ka tee winnu falihdsi-
naja ar to Wehrſi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad tu nu to Salihdsi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tew buhs tohg
KUNGGA Preekſcha uppure-
nu teem Preestereem buhs G
In us teem mest/ un tohg
Dedsamo·Uppuri uppureht te
KUNGAM.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Septinas Deenas bu
tew ikdeenas weenu Ahſi
Grehko·Uppuri fataifiht /
buhs arridsan winneem we-
jaunu Wehrſi/ un weenu Au-
no ta gannama Pulka/ abbe-
las bes Wainas/ fatatsiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Septinas Deenas bu
tecm to Altari falihdsinaht /
winnu fschkfstiht / un win
Rohkas pildiht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee nu fschkhs Deen
buhs pabeigſchi/ tad buhs te-
Preestereem astotâ Deend un
prohjam/ jubsus Dedsamo·U-
purus/ un jubfus Pateifcha-
Uppurus us to Altari fataifi-
un man buhs labs Prahts
jums/ fakka tas KUngs KUNG
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
